title: From Black to Gray: Improving Access to Antimalarial Drugs in the Presence of Deceptive Counterfeits
abstract: In malaria-endemic countries, the limited availability of affordable antimalarial medication has contributed to the widespread distribution of counterfeit drugs. This paper examines such markets to determine how philanthropic donors can best allocate limited funds to subsidize the purchase or sales of antimalarial drugs via private-sector distribution channels. We develop a game-theoretic model of the antimalarial supply chain wherein the retailer strategically sources legitimate drugs from a donor-certified supplier, potentially counterfeit drugs from an uncertified supplier, or both. In contrast with the extant literature, we demonstrate that, in the presence of counterfeits, exclusive reliance on purchase subsidies may no longer be optimal. Specifically, under donor budget constraints, offering sales subsidies that incorporate both legitimate and counterfeit drugs may be preferable or, in some cases, abstaining from subsidy provision completely. Additionally, we evaluate the implications of three pertinent nonsubsidy strategies deployed to combat counterfeit drugs: imposing penalties for sourcing counterfeits, eliminating subsidies on counterfeit drugs with traceability technology, and implementing price controls. Our study concludes with extensive numerical analysis calibrated to malaria data from Mozambique. Overall, this paper offers strategic guidance for improving outcomes in the presence of counterfeit drugs. Our results highlight the need for governments and donors to carefully consider market-specific factors, such as retailers’ pricing power and donors’ budget constraints, when designing subsidy schemes and access policies for life-saving medicines. These insights could potentially be extrapolated to address similar challenges in other endemic disease contexts, offering a broader framework for enhancing public health in resource-constrained environments. This paper was accepted by Jeannette Song, operations management. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00885 .
title_cn: 从黑暗到灰色：在伪劣假冒药物存在的情况下改善抗疟疾药物的获取途径
abstract_cn: 在疟疾流行国家，负担得起的抗疟药物的有限供应促进了假冒药物的广泛流通。本文研究了此类市场，以确定慈善捐赠者如何最好地分配有限资金，通过私营部门分销渠道来补贴抗疟药物的购买或销售。我们开发了一个关于抗疟药物供应链的博弈论模型，其中零售商战略性地从授权认证的供应商处采购合法药物，可能还会从未认证的供应商处采购假冒药物，或两者兼而有之。与现有文献相对比，我们证明，在存在假冒药物的情况下，单纯依赖购买补贴可能不再是最优选择。具体而言，在捐赠者预算约束下，提供包括合法和假冒药物的销售补贴可能更可取，或者在某些情况下，完全不提供补贴。此外，我们评估了为打击假冒药物而采取的三种相关非补贴策略的影响：对采购假冒药物者施加罚款、利用可追溯技术取消假冒药物的补贴，以及实施价格管制。我们的研究通过基于莫桑比克的疟疾数据的广泛数值分析得出结论。总体而言，本文为在假冒药物存在的情况下改善结果提供了战略指导。我们的结果强调政府和捐赠者在设计救命药物的补贴计划和获取政策时，需要仔细考虑市场特定因素，例如零售商的定价权力和捐赠者的预算限制。这些见解或许可以推广至其他流行病背景下解决类似挑战，提供一个更广泛的框架，以增强在资源有限环境中的公共卫生。本文已被运营管理领域的Jeannette Song接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00885 获取。

title: Unlocking Local Market Information Through Franchising
abstract: This paper examines the role of franchising in enabling firms to access valuable local market information. Using comprehensive data on U.S. franchised establishments, we show that franchisee-owned establishment openings robustly predict future local economic growth reflected by house price appreciation, whereas franchisor-owned outlets lack such predictive power. Franchisee investments are especially informative in markets with greater uncertainty and complexity and when facing higher investment hurdles. Franchisors appear sensitive to information frictions, avoiding direct investment in new markets that are geographically distant and lack direct flight connectivity. Our findings support the long-standing but untested assumption that franchisees possess superior private information. This paper was accepted by Maria Guadalupe, business strategy. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05903 .
title_cn: 通过特许经营解锁地方市场信息
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了特许经营在帮助公司获取宝贵地方市场信息方面的作用。利用关于美国特许经营机构的综合数据，我们显示，特许经营者拥有的机构开设数量稳健地预测了未来地方经济增长，这体现在房价的升值上，而特许人拥有的门店则缺乏这种预测能力。在市场不确定性和复杂性较高以及面对更高投资门槛时，特许经营者的投资特别具有信息价值。特许人似乎对信息摩擦敏感，避免在地理上距离较远且缺乏直飞航班连接的新市场进行直接投资。我们的发现支持了一个长期存在但未经过验证的假设，即特许经营者拥有更优越的私人信息。本文接受者为Maria Guadalupe，商业战略。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05903找到。

title: The Market Cost of Business Cycle Fluctuations
abstract: We propose a novel approach to measure the cost of aggregate economic fluctuations that does not require complete specification of investors’ risk preferences or their beliefs. With data on consumption and asset prices, an information-theoretic method is used to recover an information kernel (I-SDF). The I-SDF prices asset returns much better than tightly parametrized structural models, thereby offering a reliable candidate for the measurement of the welfare cost of business cycles. Our method enables the estimation of both the unconditional (or, average) cost of fluctuations, as well as the cost conditional on the state of the economy. We find that the cost of fluctuations is strongly time varying and countercyclical and that the cost of business cycle fluctuations is substantial, accounting for a quarter to a third of the cost of all consumption uncertainty. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00484 .
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 商业周期波动的市场成本
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法来衡量整体经济波动的成本，该方法不需要完全指定投资者的风险偏好或信念。利用消费和资产价格的数据，采用信息论的方法来恢复信息核（I-SDF）。I-SDF的定价效果优于紧密参数化的结构模型，因此为衡量商业周期的福利成本提供了一个可靠的候选者。我们的方法能够估计波动的无条件（或平均）成本，以及基于经济状态的条件成本。我们的研究发现，波动成本强烈随时间变化且具有逆周期特征，商业周期波动的成本相当可观，占所有消费不确定性成本的四分之一到三分之一。本文已被Lukas Schmid接受，涉及金融领域。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00484查看。

title: Investing in Growth Stocks: Bimodal Payoff Distribution and Expected Returns
abstract: This paper documents that the payoffs from investing in growth stocks, as measured by the decile-rank distributions (DRD) of future revenues, earnings, investment, and stock returns, follow a bimodal U-shaped pattern. In contrast, the DRD of value stocks follows a traditional bell-shaped distribution. This divergence in payoff structures suggests growth stocks are more prone to structural shocks, such as disruptive technologies. Consequently, their pricing is heavily influenced by investors’ attitude toward exceptional outcomes, resulting in lower expected stock returns in equilibrium. We find that stocks with more pronounced bimodal payoffs are associated with significantly lower subsequent stock returns. This paper was accepted by Eric So, accounting. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00980 .
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 投资成长股：双峰收益分布与预期回报
abstract_cn: 本文记录了增长型股票的投资回报，测量指标为未来收益、利润、投资和股票回报的分位数排名分布（DRD），其回报呈现双峰U形模式。相比之下，价值型股票的DRD遵循传统的钟形分布。这种回报结构的差异表明，增长型股票更容易受到结构性冲击的影响，例如颠覆性技术。因此，其定价受到投资者对异常结果态度的重大影响，导致均衡状态下预期股票回报降低。我们发现，具有更明显双峰回报的股票与后续显著较低的股票回报相关联。本文已被埃里克·索（Eric So）接受，属于会计领域。补充材料：数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00980 获取。

title: Strategy
title_cn: 策略

title: Short-Lived High-Volume Bandits
abstract: When Thousands of Items Arrive Every Hour: A New Approach to Online Experimentation Researchers have reported a new approach to address a key challenge for online platforms. In a new paper in Operations Research, Jia et al. introduced the Short-lived High-volume Bandits (SLHVB) framework. This models modern platforms where thousands of items—such as ads, stories, or interface designs—arrive each hour but remain available only briefly. The study develops a near-optimal online learning policy that balances exploration and exploitation. Theoretical analysis shows the algorithm achieves nearly the minimal possible loss as the number of user impressions grows. The team tested the policy in a large-scale field experiment with Glance, a leading lock-screen content platform. The policy increased viewing duration by 4.32% and click-through rates by 7.48% compared to the platform’s existing deep-learning-based recommender system.
title_cn: 短命高流量强盗
abstract_cn:
当每小时有成千上万的项目到达时：一种新的在线实验方法

研究人员报告了一种新方法，以应对在线平台面临的一个关键挑战。在《运筹学研究》上的一篇新论文中，Jia等人介绍了短时高容量强盗(SLHVB)框架。该框架模拟了现代平台的情况，在这些平台上，每小时会有成千上万的项目——例如广告、故事或界面设计——出现，但可用时间非常短。该研究开发了一种近乎最优的在线学习策略，以平衡探索与利用。理论分析表明，随着用户展示次数的增加，该算法实现了几乎最低的可能损失。研究团队在一个与 Glance（领先的锁屏内容平台）进行的大规模实地实验中测试了这一政策。与该平台现有的基于深度学习的推荐系统相比，该策略将观看时长提高了4.32%，点击率提高了7.48%。

title: Selling Professional Products with Consumer Uncertainty in Expertise Advancement
abstract: Problem definition: For professional products, such as musical instruments and sports gear, a consumer’s quality preference is positively associated with the consumer’s expertise level. A novice who initially chooses a low-quality product over a high-quality one may have incentive to upgrade if experiencing expertise advancement after professional training. This paper examines a firm’s strategies to sell professional products in two periods, training and posttraining, between which consumers’ expertise levels advance with uncertainty. Methodology/results: Using a game-theoretic model, we find that consumer uncertainty about expertise advancement allows the firm to expand product line and implement expertise-based intertemporal segmentation in selling a line of professional products. In addition, the firm can implement ex ante market segmentation, selling products of different qualities to consumers with different quality preferences before their training starts. Our analysis reveals the innate conflict between these two types of segmentation so that the firm may forego the opportunity of market segmentation and implement intertemporal segmentation only. Interestingly, offering a trade-in credit facilitates intertemporal segmentation and encourages the firm to offer a product line, whereas a buyback program facilitates market segmentation instead. In addition, the total consumer surplus increases whenever trade-in credit enables upgrading, and otherwise, it deteriorates or remains the same. Finally, we find that the firm is more likely to offer a product line when selling to myopic consumers, and consumer myopia may hurt firm profit. Managerial implications: Marketers of professional goods can strategically facilitate and meanwhile, profit from consumer upgrading. Also, whereas a buyback guarantee is commonly used in a regular goods market to cope with buyer uncertainty, a trade-in program is often a better option in a professional goods market. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1341 .
title_cn: 在专业产品销售中面对消费者对专业知识进步的不确定性
abstract_cn: 问题定义：对于专业产品，例如乐器和体育装备，消费者的质量偏好与其专业水平呈正相关。初学者如果最初选择低质量产品而非高质量产品，可能在经过专业培训后，因专业水平的提高而获得升级的动机。本文探讨了企业在两个时期（培训期和后培训期）销售专业产品的策略，这两个时期之间消费者的专业水平提升存在不确定性。方法论/结果：通过使用博弈论模型，我们发现消费者对专业水平提升的无知使得企业能够扩大产品线并在销售专业产品时实施基于专业水平的跨期市场细分。此外，企业可以在培训开始前对不同质量偏好的消费者实施事前市场细分，向他们销售不同质量的产品。我们的分析揭示了这两种细分方式之间的内在冲突，以至于企业可能放弃市场细分的机会，仅实施跨期细分。有趣的是，提供以旧换新信贷促进了跨期细分，并鼓励企业提供产品线，而回购计划则更加促进市场细分。此外，消费者剩余在以旧换新信贷促进升级时会增加，而在其他情况下则会恶化或保持不变。最后，我们发现当向短视消费者销售时，企业更可能提供产品线，而消费者短视可能会损害企业的利润。管理启示：专业商品的市场营销者可以战略性地促进并同时从消费者的升级中获利。此外，尽管回购保证在普通商品市场中常用于应对买方不确定性，但在专业商品市场中，以旧换新计划通常是更好的选择。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1341 获取。

title: Are Auction-Based Promotions More Profitable for Short Video Platforms than Fixed Pricing?
abstract: Short video platforms increasingly offer paid promotion tools that allow creators to boost the visibility of their content. These tools are typically priced through either fixed fees or auction-based bidding systems. We examine how these two promotion mechanisms affect platform revenue, creator incentives, and the engagement of promoted content. Our results show that auction-based promotion does not universally outperform fixed pricing. Auctions generate higher platform revenue only when competition for viewer attention is sufficiently intense—that is, when the number of creators relative to viewers is high. When competition among creators is limited, fixed pricing can produce greater revenue while maintaining stronger engagement. We also find that auctions attract more creators to promote their videos, but this broader participation can dilute engagement by allowing lower-appeal videos into the promotion queue. For creators, auctions tend to benefit those with very high-appeal or very low-appeal content, whereas those with moderately appealing content may be disadvantaged. These findings suggest that platforms should align their promotion policies with the maturity of their creator ecosystems, utilizing fixed pricing in early stages and shifting to auction mechanisms as competition intensifies. Ultimately, our framework empowers managers to dynamically adapt their pricing strategies as their user bases evolve.
title_cn: 拍卖促销对于短视频平台来说，是否比固定定价更具盈利性？
abstract_cn: 短视频平台逐渐提供付费推广工具，允许创作者提升其内容的可见性。这些工具的定价通常采用固定费用或拍卖竞标系统。我们研究了这两种推广机制对平台收入、创作者激励及推广内容的参与度的影响。我们的结果表明，拍卖式推广并不总是优于固定定价。只有在观众关注竞争激烈时，拍卖才能产生更高的平台收入——即创作者与观众的比例较高时。当创作者之间的竞争有限时，固定定价能够在维持更强参与度的同时产生更高的收入。我们还发现，拍卖能够吸引更多创作者推广他们的视频，但这种更广泛的参与可能会稀释参与度，因为它允许较低吸引力的视频进入推广队列。对于创作者而言，拍卖往往有利于那些非常高吸引力或非常低吸引力的内容，而中等吸引力的内容则可能处于不利地位。这些发现表明，平台应将其推广政策与创作者生态系统的成熟度相结合，在早期阶段采用固定定价，并在竞争加剧时转向拍卖机制。最终，我们的框架使管理者能够根据用户基础的发展动态调整定价策略。

title: Bargaining over Data and Analytics: Sellers, Buyers and Consultants
abstract: Most firms routinely gather vast amounts of data as part of doing business. Monetizing this proprietary data is an increasingly attractive revenue stream for many of these firms. Two fundamental decisions need to be made when deciding to sell, the first involving a choice between selling exclusively to a single buyer or nonexclusively to many, and the second related to what exactly should be sold—just the data or a data product that bundles data with analytics services. As firms often resort to bargaining to arrive at sale agreements, we analyze these decisions through the lens of a bargaining framework. When the buyer needs help from a third-party consultant, she too needs to make a decision—between negotiating separately with the seller and the consultant, and with both of them simultaneously. We find that there are situations where sellers can benefit from bundling the data with analytics services even when their analytics capabilities are weak relative to those of external consultants. Simultaneous negotiations enable buyers to extract more of the consultant’s contribution, making them preferable to buyers when consultants add substantial value. Broadly, this study provides a road map for structuring contracts to firms considering the sale of their proprietary data.
title_cn: 数据与分析的博弈：卖方、买方与顾问
abstract_cn: 大多数公司在经营过程中都会定期收集大量数据。将这些专有数据货币化对许多公司来说越来越具有吸引力，成为了一种新的收入来源。在决定销售时，需要做出两个基本决策：第一个是在选择将数据独占性地出售给单一买家还是非独占性地出售给多个买家之间进行选择；第二个是到底应该出售什么——仅仅是数据，还是一个将数据与分析服务捆绑在一起的数据产品。由于公司通常会通过谈判达成销售协议，我们通过谈判框架分析这些决策。当买家需要第三方顾问的帮助时，买家也必须做出一个决定——是在与卖方和顾问分别谈判，还是与他们同时谈判。我们发现，在某些情况下，即使卖方的分析能力相对于外部顾问较弱，捆绑数据与分析服务仍能为卖方带来好处。与此同时进行的谈判使买家能够获取更多来自顾问的贡献，当顾问提供了大量价值时，这种方式对买家更为有利。总体而言，本研究为考虑出售专有数据的公司提供了合同结构设计的路线图。

title: Align Generative Artificial Intelligence with Human Preferences: A Novel Large Language Model Fine-Tuning Method for Online Review Management
abstract: Online reviews can shape where people stay, eat, and shop, but businesses often struggle to keep up with the flood of customer feedback. Although generative artificial intelligence (AI) offers a promising solution, general-purpose models are not designed for the specific judgment, tone, and accuracy required in customer review responses. This study introduces a new fine-tuning method that helps large language models generate review replies that better match human preferences in real business settings. The paper makes several technical advances. It identifies why review-response systems hallucinate and introduces a context-augmentation strategy to reduce factual errors. It also develops a theory-driven way to automatically construct preference data from existing review-response records, overcoming a major barrier in preference fine-tuning. In addition, the study proposes a curriculum learning design and a new support-constraint method that reduces the overconservatism of existing offline optimization approaches, with stronger theoretical guarantees. Tests on hotel reviews show that the method produces better responses than leading alternatives in both automated evaluations and human judgments. The findings point to a practical path for using AI to help firms respond faster and more consistently to customers while also underscoring the need for safeguards, human oversight, and domain-specific model alignment in customer-facing AI systems.
title_cn: 将生成性人工智能与人类偏好对齐：一种用于在线评论管理的新型大型语言模型微调方法
abstract_cn: 在线评论可以影响人们的住宿、饮食和购物选择，但企业常常难以应对客户反馈的洪流。尽管生成性人工智能（AI）提供了一个有前景的解决方案，但通用模型并未针对客户评价回复所需的特定判断、语调和准确性进行设计。本研究提出了一种新的微调方法，帮助大型语言模型生成更符合真实商业环境中人类偏好的评论回复。本文在多个技术方面取得了进展。研究指出了评论回复系统产生幻觉的原因，并引入了一种上下文增强策略，以减少事实错误。此外，研究开发了一种基于理论的方法，自动构建现有评论回复记录中的偏好数据，克服了偏好微调中的主要障碍。此外，本文还提出了一种课程学习设计和一种新的支持约束方法，以减少现有离线优化方法的过度保守性，并提供了更强的理论保证。对酒店评论的测试表明，该方法在自动评估和人类判断中均产生了比领先替代方案更好的回复。研究结果指出了利用AI帮助企业更快速、一致地回应客户的实践路径，同时强调了在面向客户的AI系统中需要设置保护措施、进行人工监督和实现领域特定模型对齐的重要性。

title: Disclosure of Cybersecurity Investments and the Cost of Capital
abstract: Executives often hesitate to disclose their company’s cybersecurity investments, fearing lawsuits or negative reactions from investors. Our research shows that transparency in this area actually pays off. Analyzing SEC filings from nearly 2,000 public firms, we find that companies that disclose cybersecurity investments enjoy a lower cost of capital—cheaper access to debt and equity financing. These benefits are strongest when disclosures are specific rather than boilerplate, when the firm is followed by more analysts and more institutional investors, and when disclosed investments in cybersecurity are substantial. The takeaway is clear: Meaningful disclosure builds trust with investors, who reward transparency by lowering financing costs. For leaders and regulators alike, this finding highlights that openness about cybersecurity readiness is not just good governance—It is smart business in a capital market that increasingly values risk management and resilience.
title_cn: 网络安全投资的披露与资本成本
abstract_cn: 高管们常常犹豫是否披露公司在网络安全方面的投资，担心可能面临诉讼或投资者的负面反应。我们的研究表明，在这一领域的透明度实际上是有回报的。通过分析近2000家上市公司的SEC filings，我们发现，披露网络安全投资的公司能够享受较低的资本成本——即更便宜的债务和股权融资。这些好处在披露内容具体而非模板化、公司获得更多分析师和机构投资者关注时以及披露的网络安全投资额相对较大时最为显著。结论很明确：有意义的披露可以增强投资者的信任，而投资者则通过降低融资成本来回馈这种透明度。对于领导者和监管者而言，这一发现强调了对网络安全准备情况的开放态度不仅仅是良好的治理——在一个日益重视风险管理和韧性的资本市场中，这也是明智的商业策略。

title: Scaling high and wide: How firms leverage AI and organizational design to overcome the scale‐scope trade‐off
abstract: Abstract Research Summary The trade‐off between scale and scope has long posed a strategic dilemma, especially in digital settings, where specialization enables hyperscaling. Drawing on a longitudinal case study of ByteDance, we theorize how digital firms can overcome this constraint through the use of artificial intelligence (AI) combined with an adaptive organizational design. AI evolves and improves through self‐learning and cross‐fertilization across domains, becoming increasingly valuable as learning accumulates. This, however, is contingent on access to structurally related data that allow learning to transfer across domains. We show how AI reverses the conventional logic of the resource‐based view: rather than valuable resources enabling diversification, diversification amplifies the value of resources. AI thus transforms the scale‐scope nexus from being a trade‐off into a source of strategic advantage. Managerial Summary The growing centrality of AI and digital platforms is reshaping how firms pursue and sustain growth. This study examines how ByteDance leveraged AI and adaptive organizational design not only to scale rapidly but also to diversify across industries and markets. Rather than incurring rising costs or coordination complexity, the firm's AI capabilities improved with each deployment through cross‐fertilization across domains, enabling more efficient growth across multiple domains. For managers, the findings highlight how dynamic combinations of AI and organizational structure can help overcome traditional trade‐offs between scale and scope, opening new pathways for scalable, cross‐market expansion in increasingly competitive environments.
title_cn: 高效扩张：企业如何利用人工智能和组织设计克服规模-范围权衡问题
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 规模与范围之间的权衡长期以来一直是一个战略难题，尤其是在数字环境中，专业化使得超大规模化成为可能。基于对字节跳动的纵向案例研究，我们提出了数字企业如何通过人工智能（AI）结合适应性组织设计克服这一限制的理论。人工智能通过自我学习和跨领域的交叉融合不断演变和改进，随着学习的积累，其价值日益提升。然而，这一过程依赖于对结构相关数据的获取，这些数据使得学习能够在不同领域之间进行迁移。我们展示了人工智能如何颠覆资源基础观的传统逻辑：不是价值资源促进多样化，而是多样化增强了资源的价值。因此，人工智能将规模与范围的关系由权衡转变为战略优势的来源。 管理总结 人工智能和数字平台的日益中心化正在重塑企业追求和维持增长的方式。本研究考察了字节跳动如何利用人工智能和适应性组织设计，不仅快速扩张，还在多个行业和市场中实现多样化。与其承担不断上升的成本或协调复杂性，该公司的人工智能能力在每次部署中通过跨领域的交叉融合得到了提升，使得在多个领域中的增长更加高效。对管理者而言，研究结果强调了人工智能与组织结构的动态组合如何帮助克服规模与范围之间的传统权衡，为在日益竞争激烈的环境中开辟可扩展的跨市场扩张的新途径。

title: CEO Succession Under Anticipatory Awareness Misalignment
abstract: We develop a dynamic model of chief executive officer (CEO) succession under anticipatory awareness misalignment: the divergence between the board’s and the CEO’s private beliefs about the firm’s strategic potential. The CEO chooses unobservable effort, may send costly noncontractible signals, and faces interim termination based on performance thresholds. We derive closed-form expressions for optimal CEO incentive intensity, effort, and fixed pay and show how they are influenced by belief misalignment, CEO capability, and market frictions. We present propositions that explain how belief alignment affects effort and pay, how misaligned types are separated through signaling, and how misalignment impacts firing thresholds and the matching of boards and CEO. We show that misalignment reduces incentive efficiency, increases fixed pay, and increases the probability of early dismissal. CEOs aligned with the board receive higher variable compensation; misaligned types must compensate with signals or accept weaker incentives. The model generates empirically testable predictions on compensation structure, retention, and succession outcomes. Funding: A. Camuffo and A. Gambardella acknowledge support from the H2020 European Research Council [Grant 101021061]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2025.20384 .
title_cn: 首席执行官继任中的预期意识失调
abstract_cn: 我们建立了一个首席执行官（CEO）继任动态模型，该模型考虑了预期意识不对齐的问题：即董事会与CEO对公司战略潜力的私人信念之间的差异。CEO选择不可观察的努力，可能会发送高成本的非合同性信号，并根据绩效阈值面临中期解雇。我们推导出了最佳CEO激励强度、努力程度和固定薪酬的封闭形式表达，并展示了它们如何受到信念不对齐、CEO能力和市场摩擦的影响。我们提出了命题，解释了信念一致性如何影响努力和薪酬，如何通过信号将不一致类型分离，以及不对齐如何影响解雇阈值和董事会与CEO的匹配。我们展示了不对齐会降低激励效率，增加固定薪酬，并提高早期解雇的概率。与董事会一致的CEO获得更高的可变薪酬；不一致的类型必须通过信号进行补偿，或者接受较弱的激励。该模型产生了关于薪酬结构、留任和继任结果的可实证检验的预测。资金支持：A. Camuffo 和 A. Gambardella 感谢H2020欧洲研究委员会[资助编号101021061]的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2025.20384访问。

title: A Platform Rating System and Vulnerable Workers: Evidence from Field Experiments in Singapore
abstract: Rating systems are a common governance tool on two-sided platforms. Research suggests that, via indirect network effects, rating systems benefit participants on both the rating side and the rated side. However, participants on the rated side may not always recognize the benefits of the rating system and may respond negatively to its introduction. The rating side may anticipate the rated side’s negative reactions and react negatively as well, especially when the rated side holds more power over the rating side. To empirically examine participants’ reactions to a proposed platform rating system in the context of a substantial cross-side power differential, we conducted two field experiments in collaboration with a Singapore-based labor platform that connects foreign domestic workers with employers (families). We found that employers, on average, were indifferent to the proposed rating system, even when the benefits to them were highlighted, with the highest-income employers exhibiting negative responses. We also found that workers reacted negatively, with those informed of the proposed rating system completely disengaging from the platform. Post hoc interviews and analyses support our interpretation that power differential underlies workers’ negative responses to the rating system. This study contributes to the literature on platform rating systems by demonstrating that, in the presence of a substantial cross-side power imbalance, rating systems may not always be perceived positively, even by participants on the rating side, whom the system aims to empower. It also constitutes one of the first efforts in management research to study domestic workers, a highly vulnerable population of workers. Funding: This work was supported by Chazen Institute of Global Business (Columbia University) and INSEAD. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.18153 .
title_cn: 平台评分系统与弱势工人：来自新加坡现场实验的证据
abstract_cn: 评分系统是双边平台上常见的治理工具。研究表明，通过间接网络效应，评分系统使评分方和被评分方的参与者均受益。然而，被评分方的参与者可能并不总是认识到评分系统的好处，并可能对其引入作出负面反应。评分方可能会预见到被评分方的负面反应，并相应作出负面反应，尤其是在被评分方对评分方拥有更大权力时。为了在存在显著跨方权力差异的背景下实证检验参与者对拟议平台评分系统的反应，我们与一个总部位于新加坡的劳务平台合作进行了两项实地实验，该平台连接外国家庭佣工与雇主（家庭）。我们发现，雇主对拟议的评分系统平均表现出无所谓的态度，即使在强调其对雇主的好处时，高收入的雇主们也表现出负面反应。我们还发现，工人们反应消极，知晓拟议评分系统的工人完全与平台脱离联系。事后访谈和分析支持我们对工人对评分系统负面反应的解读，认为权力差异是其反应的根本原因。这项研究为平台评分系统的文献做出了贡献，表明在存在显著跨方权力不平衡的情况下，即使是评分方的参与者，也不一定对评分系统持积极看法，而评分系统的目的就是为了赋权这些参与者。这项研究也是管理研究领域针对家庭佣工这一高度脆弱劳动群体的首批努力之一。资金支持：本研究得到了哥伦比亚大学查岑全球商业研究所和INSEAD的资助。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.18153 获取。

title: What Is the Price of Spanning Domain Boundaries? Distant Recombination and the Market Valuations of Firm Inventions
abstract: Do investors value firm inventions that recombine distant knowledge across domain boundaries? Analyzing more than 1.5 million firm patents, we find that, despite its strong association with long-term technological impact beyond the local domain, distant recombination of domain knowledge contributes less to a patent’s market valuation when compared to local recombination, thereby inducing a misalignment between valuation and impact. This valuation disadvantage is especially pronounced when distant recombination occurs in a domain primarily built on local knowledge, draws on knowledge from domains with broad applicability, and spans domains with limited connections. Mechanism tests suggest that the inherent evaluation and appropriation challenges for inventions built on distant recombination plausibly account for these findings. We thus establish domain distinctions in knowledge recombination as a key explanation of why innovations’ private returns may diverge from their technological impact despite the commonly assumed alignment between the two. Funding: The authors acknowledge financial support from Cornell University. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.17475 .
title_cn: 跨越领域边界的代价是什么？遥远重组与企业发明的市场估值
abstract_cn: 投资者是否重视跨领域边界重组远程知识的企业发明？通过分析超过150万个企业专利，我们发现，尽管远程知识的重组与超越本地领域的长期技术影响有着强烈的关联，但与本地重组相比，远程知识重组对专利市场估值的贡献较小，从而导致估值与影响之间的错位。这种估值劣势在远程重组发生在主要基于本地知识的领域、借鉴来自具有广泛适用性的领域知识以及跨越连接有限的领域时尤为明显。机制测试表明，基于远程重组的发明固有的评估和收益获取挑战可能解释了这些发现。因此，我们确定知识重组中的领域区分是创新的私人收益可能与其技术影响偏离的关键原因，尽管通常假设两者之间存在一致性。资助：作者感谢康奈尔大学提供的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.17475获取。

title: Behavioral micro-foundations for the space commons: A policy toolkit
title_cn: 空间公共资源的行为微基础：政策工具包

title: Creating supply-chain effects from sustainable practices: scaling relationships in agrifood systems
abstract: Purpose Sustainable practices of food production are often pioneered and implemented by hybrid organisations, who bridge profit and sustainability goals and shape their collaborative strategies accordingly. This study aims to investigate how such hybrid organisations manage the scaling relationships with their supply chain to scale the effects of their practices. Design/methodology/approach This study frames initial conceptualisation based on the scaling relationships hybrid organisations build with the wider supply network to achieve scaling effects. The in-depth evidence from seven cases in the UK agrifood sector shows how these scaling relationships with large retailers (e.g. supermarkets) or with other sustainability-oriented organisations (e.g. independent farm shops) are managed. Findings The findings show the different paths for managing scaling relationships, their upstream implications and scaling effects depending on the selected partner. Scaling relationships with large retailers are defined by the retailer’s business terms and are characterised by active supply arrangement with distinct beginnings and endings. Relationships with other sustainability-oriented organisations are explored within the context of a community with shared values, where episodic explorations of active supply arrangements provide a temporary formal frame. Originality/value The contributions arise from identifying the distinct ways hybrid organisations manage scaling relationships with large retailers or other sustainability-oriented organisations. While relationships with large retailers largely mirror existing supply-chain theory, the insights regarding the scaling relationships with other sustainability-oriented organisations indicate a community approach where joint knowledge creation is prioritised over material flows.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 通过可持续实践创造供应链效应：在农业食品系统中扩展关系
abstract_cn: 目的 可持续的食品生产实践通常由混合组织率先推行并实施，这些组织在盈利与可持续性目标之间架起桥梁，并相应地塑造他们的合作策略。本研究旨在探讨这些混合组织如何管理与其供应链的扩展关系，以扩大其实践的效果。设计/方法论/方法 本研究基于混合组织与更广泛供应网络建立的扩展关系进行初步概念化，以实现扩展效果。来自英国农业食品行业七个案例的深入证据展示了这些与大型零售商（如超市）或其他可持续发展导向组织（如独立农场商店）的扩展关系是如何管理的。发现 研究结果表明，根据所选择的合作伙伴，管理扩展关系的路径、上游影响及扩展效果有所不同。与大型零售商的扩展关系受零售商商业条款的定义，并以主动供应安排为特征，具有明显的起始和结束。与其他可持续发展导向组织的关系则在共享价值观的社区背景下进行探讨，其中对主动供应安排的阶段性探索提供了临时的正式框架。原创性/价值 本研究的贡献在于识别混合组织与大型零售商或其他可持续发展导向组织管理扩展关系的独特方式。尽管与大型零售商的关系在很大程度上反映了现有的供应链理论，但关于与其他可持续发展导向组织的扩展关系的见解则表明了一种社区方法，其中共同知识的创造被优先于物质流动。

title: Transformation of supplier digital absorptive capacity management: an engaged research perspective
abstract: Purpose The purpose of this study is to explore how supplier digital absorptive capacity can be assessed as a component of a supplier evaluation system and to identify the accompanying supplier development (SD) mechanisms that support suppliers in learning and adopting this important capability. Design/methodology/approach The authors used engaged scholarship methods to observe and measure change as Rolls-Royce deployed Model-Based Definition/Enterprise (MBD/E) digital technology across its global supply chain. Data was collected from two tiers of the supply chain through interviews, workshops and documentation. Findings This analysis supports the relationship between SD activities as a means for improving the transfer of digital knowledge between buyers and suppliers. An important insight from our research is that suppliers’ ability to absorb digital knowledge from buyers relies on measures of digital progress and regular reviews. These activities are underpinned by establishing a digital minimum standard for assessing the rate of supplier improvement. Research limitations/implications This longitudinal study took place over three years of on-site observations of SD activities. Because the analysis was context specific, the findings of this study may not apply to all organisations undergoing digital transformation. However, the AC framework provides a foundation for future research in different industries, which may enhance its generalisability. Originality/value This novel study provides an assessment of how supplier digital absorptive capacity can be empirically captured as a component of a supplier evaluation system. The findings contribute to broader theories on absorptive capacity (AC) and provide practical implications for supplier managers adopting new digital technologies.
title_cn: 供应商数字吸收能力管理的转型：一种参与式研究视角
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在探讨如何将供应商的数字吸收能力评估作为供应商评估系统的一个组成部分，并识别支持供应商学习和采用这一重要能力的相关供应商发展(SD)机制。 设计/方法论/途径 作者采用参与式学术研究方法，观察并衡量罗尔斯-罗伊斯在其全球供应链中部署基于模型的定义/企业(MBD/E)数字技术的变化。数据通过访谈、研讨会和文档收集自供应链的两个层级。 发现 此分析支持了将SD活动视为改善买方与供应商之间数字知识传递的方法。我们研究的一个重要见解是，供应商从买方吸收数字知识的能力依赖于数字进展的测量和定期评审。这些活动的基础是建立评估供应商改进速度的数字最低标准。 研究局限性/启示 本纵向研究在三年的现场观察SD活动中进行。由于分析是特定于情境的，因此本研究的发现可能不适用于所有经历数字转型的组织。然而，AC框架为未来在不同产业中的研究提供了基础，可能增强其普遍适用性。 独创性/价值 本研究为如何将供应商数字吸收能力作为供应商评估系统的组成部分进行实证捕捉提供了评估。研究结果为关于吸收能力(AC)的更广泛理论做出了贡献，并为采用新数字技术的供应商经理提供了实践意义。

title: Anthony Abraham Jack. Class Dismissed: When Colleges Ignore Inequality & Students Pay the Price JackAnthony Abraham. Class Dismissed: When Colleges Ignore Inequality & Students Pay the Price.Princeton University Press, 2024. 312 pp. $29.95, hardcover.
title_cn: 安东尼·亚伯拉罕·杰克。《课堂解散：当高校忽视不平等时，学生付出代价》。普林斯顿大学出版社，2024年，312页，定价29.95美元，精装本。

title: Unintended Consequences: The Effects of Cigarette Graphic Health Warnings on Electronic Cigarette Risk Perceptions and Intentions
abstract: Grounded in ethical theories of manipulation, autonomy, and informed choice, this research examines whether asymmetric health warning schemes distort consumers’ comparative risk judgments across substitutable harmful products. Four experimental studies demonstrate that cigarette graphic health warnings reliably evoke smoking-related fear that, through contrast-based spillover effects, positions e-cigarettes as comparatively less harmful, generates more favorable attitudes, and increases purchase and trial intentions. These effects operate through a serial mediation process in which fear increases motivation to quit smoking, which in turn directs behavioral intentions toward e-cigarettes rather than toward the cessation of nicotine use. Study 4 further reveals that asymmetric warning conditions in which only cigarettes carry graphic warnings maximize psychological reactance by signaling selective regulatory targeting, whereas extending graphic warnings to e-cigarettes attenuates both the contrast-based and reactance-driven spillover effects. The results support warning congruence as an ethically preferable regulatory design that better preserves the conditions for informed comparative judgment, and carry implications for ethically responsible policy design, corporate conduct, and consumer welfare in markets involving harmful but legally available products.
title_cn: 意外后果：香烟图形健康警示对电子烟风险感知和行为意图的影响
abstract_cn: 基于操控、自治和知情选择的伦理理论，本研究探讨了不对称健康警示方案是否扭曲消费者对可替代有害产品的相对风险判断。通过四项实验研究，结果表明香烟图形健康警示可靠地引发吸烟相关的恐惧，这种恐惧通过基于对比的溢出效应，使电子烟显得相对无害，产生更有利的态度，并增强购买和尝试的意图。这些效果通过一个串联中介过程进行，其中恐惧增加了戒烟的动机，进而将行为意图引导至电子烟，而非尼古丁使用的戒断。研究4进一步揭示，只有香烟带有图形警示的不对称警示条件通过表明选择性监管目标，最大化了心理反抗的程度，而将图形警示扩展至电子烟则减弱了基于对比和反抗驱动的溢出效应。这些结果支持警示一致性作为一种伦理上更可取的监管设计，能够更好地维护知情比较判断的条件，并对涉及有害但法律上可用产品的政策设计、企业行为和消费者福利提出了伦理责任的启示。

title: Pathogen Stress Theory in Business Ethics: Bio-ecological Influences on Firms’ Environmental Sustainability Practices
abstract: Abstract Despite their potential significance, bio-ecological determinants of ethical and sustainable business behavior have been largely unexplored in business ethics research. This study examines the impact of pathogen stress—a bio-ecological factor that has been shown to be critical for human attitudes, intentions, and behaviors—on firms’ environmental sustainability practices. Pathogen stress refers to the prevalence of a broad spectrum of infectious agents, including viruses, bacteria, protozoa, and helminths, that threaten human health and survival. We theorize that higher levels of pathogen stress negatively affect firms’ adoption of environmental sustainability practices. Analyzing data from nearly 20,000 firms across 37 countries using the World Bank Enterprise Surveys and a country-level pathogen stress index, we observe that firms in contexts with higher pathogen prevalence are less likely to adopt environmental sustainability practices. To elucidate the underlying causality, we employ an experimental vignette design that identifies two mediating psychological mechanisms: a temporal mechanism (heightened short-term orientation) and a relational mechanism (increased ingroup trust bias). We discuss the implications of the results for business ethics research and suggest several future research avenues to improve the understanding of bio-ecological factors for ethical and sustainable firm decision-making, strategies, and behaviors.
topics: Psychology of Moral and Emotional Judgment
title_cn: 商业伦理中的病原应激理论：生物生态因素对企业环境可持续实践的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 尽管生物生态因素在道德和可持续商业行为中的潜在重要性，但在商业伦理研究中对此的探讨尚属空白。本研究探讨了病原体压力——一种已被证实对人类态度、意图和行为至关重要的生物生态因素——对企业环境可持续实践的影响。病原体压力是指多种感染性病原体（包括病毒、细菌、原生动物和蠕虫）的流行，这些病原体威胁人类健康和生存。我们理论推测，较高水平的病原体压力会对企业采用环境可持续实践产生负面影响。通过分析来自37个国家近20,000家企业的世界银行企业调查数据和国家级病原体压力指数，我们观察到，在病原体流行程度较高的环境中，企业不太可能采纳环境可持续实践。为了阐明潜在的因果关系，我们采用实验情境设计，识别出两种心理中介机制：一种是时间机制（短期导向增强），另一种是关系机制（内群体信任偏向增强）。我们讨论了研究结果对商业伦理研究的启示，并建议了几条未来的研究方向，以改善对生物生态因素在道德和可持续企业决策、战略和行为中的理解。

title: Vultures, Vampires, and Necro-waste in the Oil and Gas Industry
title_cn: 秃鹫、吸血鬼与石油和天然气行业的尸体废物

title: Responsibilising Conservation: Accountability and Ethics of Community Engagement in Biodiversity Initiatives
abstract: Abstract This paper examines how environmental non-governmental organisations (ENGOs) construct, justify and enact community engagement in biodiversity conservation, and the ethical tensions that arise as accountability responsibilities are increasingly shifted towards local communities. Drawing on the concept of responsibilisation (Rose, 1999) and using Habermasian (1984) validity claims as an analytical framework, the study analyses qualitative data from NGO-led conservation initiatives to interrogate the normative foundations and practical effects of participatory governance arrangements. The findings show that GreenAction uses a progressive engagement process, blending communication, moral framing, economic incentives, and delegated accountability rather than one participatory model. This approach justifies community involvement as both legitimate and effective, whilst at the same time embedding conservation within wider neoliberal accountability frameworks. These practices expose significant ethical challenges in managing community-based conservation. Although involving communities is ethically sound at first, it becomes more problematic as they take on greater roles in conservation work and accountability. As a result, communities are held accountable not only for protecting species but also for providing the necessary accounting evidence to demonstrate conservation outcomes. This conflation of biodiversity responsibilisation with ‘accounting responsibilisation’ marks a critical finding of the study.
title_cn: 赋予保护责任：生物多样性倡议中的社区参与责任和伦理
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了环境非政府组织（ENGOs）如何构建、辩解和实施在生物多样性保护中的社区参与，以及随着问责责任越来越多地转向地方社区而产生的伦理紧张关系。基于责任化（responsibilisation）概念（Rose，1999），并采用哈贝马斯（Habermas，1984）的有效性主张作为分析框架，本研究分析了来自非政府组织主导的保护倡议的定性数据，以审视参与式治理安排的规范基础和实际影响。研究结果表明，GreenAction采用了一种渐进的参与过程，融合了沟通、道德框架、经济激励和委托问责，而不是单一的参与模型。这种方法不仅将社区参与合理化为合法且有效，同时也将保护工作嵌入更广泛的新自由主义问责框架中。这些做法暴露出在管理基于社区的保护方面的重要伦理挑战。尽管最初让社区参与在伦理上是合理的，但随着社区在保护工作及问责中的角色日益加重，这种参与变得更为复杂。因此，社区不仅要对保护物种负责，还要提供必要的账目证据以证明保护成果。这种生物多样性责任化与“会计责任化”的混淆是本研究的一个重要发现。

title: Upward convergence: digital regulations and digital firms’ internationalization
abstract: Abstract Digital regulations are often portrayed as barriers to digital firms’ internationalization because they hinder digital firms’ market penetration and fragment their global operations. We argue, however, that regulations may play a different role for digital firms that internationalize through virtual presence. Leveraging the European Union’s (EU’s) General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) as context, we examine how the GDPR affects digital products’ penetration in the EU and whether it drives operational fragmentation between EU and non-EU markets. We theorize that the GDPR does not uniformly reduce penetration opportunities; instead, it benefits low data-dependent products and explorative products that differ substantially from firms’ prior offerings. Moreover, building on digital firms’ reliance on network effects, we propose that digital firms may treat the EU as a global benchmark and release EU-penetrated products to non-EU markets, converging upward rather than separating their international operations, thus strengthening the positive association between EU penetration and subsequent non-EU entry. We found support for our hypotheses by analyzing international user-acquisition activities of the top 500 mobile game developers. Our findings contribute to international business research by showing that digital regulations can create new penetration opportunities and act as institutional catalysts that standardize digital firms’ cross-border expansion.
title_cn: 向上趋同：数字监管与数字企业国际化
abstract_cn: 摘要 数字监管通常被视为数字企业国际化的障碍，因为它们阻碍了数字企业的市场渗透并碎片化了其全球运营。然而，我们认为，对于通过虚拟存在进行国际化的数字企业而言，监管可能扮演着不同的角色。借助欧盟（EU）的通用数据保护条例（GDPR）作为背景，我们研究了GDPR如何影响数字产品在欧盟的渗透及其是否导致欧盟与非欧盟市场之间的操作碎片化。我们理论化GDPR并不均匀地减少渗透机会；相反，它有利于低数据依赖的产品和与企业先前产品有显著不同的探索性产品。此外，基于数字企业对网络效应的依赖，我们提出数字企业可能将欧盟视为全球基准，并向非欧盟市场发布已在欧盟渗透的产品，从而实现提升而非分离其国际运营，进而加强欧盟渗透与后续非欧盟市场进入之间的积极关联。通过分析前500家移动游戏开发者的国际用户获取活动，我们发现支持我们的假设。我们的研究成果为国际商务研究提供了贡献，表明数字监管可以创造新的渗透机会，并作为标准化数字企业跨境扩展的制度催化剂。
